blocks.body: Future Simple Passive is used to describe actions that will happen in the future in the passive state. Formula: will be + V3.

{ "title": "9. Short summary", "items": [ "Future Simple Passive: will be + V3.", "Will is the same for all persons.", "be is an invariant part, always before V3.", "Objection: will not (won't) be + V3.", "Question: Will + Subject + be + V3?", "Used for: future actions, official announcements, promises.", "Time markers: tomorrow, next week, soon, in 2025, etc.", "Don't forget be between will and V3!" ] }
